title: Image stage (best-effort, never blocks a card)
description: Deferred from the MVP. Add a pipeline stage that attaches images to cards: pull illustrations out of source EPUBs (like the baseline jbp-lesson-deck crop_objects flow) and/or generate images. Must be best-effort — a missing image never blocks a card. Populates the card 'image' field the T007 deck builder already supports.

title: EPUB translation-verify pass via claude -p
description: When a source (textbook/EPUB) already carries target-language translations, don't regenerate them — instead have the translation stage run a claude -p verification pass to sanity-check the embedded translations and flag suspicious ones for review, rather than trusting them blindly. Complements T004 (extractor captures embedded translations in notes) and T005 (translation stage).

title: Frequency ranking / prioritization of sourced corpora
description: For corpora sourced from a large reference (EPUB/textbook), rank candidate terms by frequency or usefulness so a user can take the top-N highest-value terms for a travel-sized deck instead of everything. Helps keep 'survival' decks small and high-impact.

title: Additional deck purposes beyond travel
description: Travel is the first purpose. Add more bundled corpus templates for other logical purposes (e.g. restaurant/dining, business basics, medical/pharmacy, transit). No engine change expected — just new categorized templates in the T003 registry.

title: Manual/interactive corpus entry flow
description: A third corpus source alongside template and EPUB: let the user hand-enter or paste a list of English terms (with categories) that the tool turns into a corpus.json. The schema already supports meta.sourceType 'manual'; this is the flow to populate it.
